programme.title: Morning Stir
programme.desc: A fresh start to the day with Nova 1's flagship morning variety show. Hosts Carla Voss and Danny Egan bring celebrity interviews, cooking demos, and feel-good stories.

programme.title: The Whitmore Case
programme.desc: Season 3, Ep 7 — Detective Ines Parrott closes in on the suspect who has been eluding her for three episodes. A tense confrontation unfolds at the river warehouse.

programme.title: Nova Midday Report
programme.desc: A concise look at the top stories of the morning, presented by anchor Solene Richter.

programme.title: Golden Afternoon Movie: The Long Shore
programme.desc: A 1987 classic starring Raymond Holt as a lighthouse keeper whose quiet life is upended when a stranger washes ashore. Beautifully shot on the Pacific coast.

programme.title: Cook and Conquer
programme.desc: Chef Mario Delacroix challenges two home cooks to recreate his signature bouillabaisse in under 45 minutes with a pantry of mystery ingredients.

programme.title: Evening Edition
programme.desc: Nova 1's primetime newscast. Anchor Solene Richter leads in-depth coverage of the day's top domestic and international stories.

programme.title: The Whitmore Case Encore
programme.desc: Catch up on Season 3, Ep 6 before tonight's new episode. Detective Parrott discovers a second set of fingerprints at the dockside apartment.

programme.title: Late Night with Jojo Kamau
programme.desc: Comedian and host Jojo Kamau sits down with actress Priya Sandhu and musician Travis Lorne. Musical guest: The Elevators.

programme.title: Overnight Cinema: Cold Harbor
programme.desc: A gripping Cold War thriller from 1991. Two rival spies discover they are hunting the same target: each other's handler.

programme.title: Nova 1 Overnight Block
programme.desc: Classic episodes from Nova 1's archive library, running through the early morning hours.

programme.title: Morning Stir
programme.desc: A fresh start to the day with Nova 1's flagship morning variety show. Hosts Carla Voss and Danny Egan bring celebrity interviews, cooking demos, and feel-good stories.

programme.title: The Whitmore Case
programme.desc: Season 3, Ep 7 — Detective Ines Parrott closes in on the suspect who has been eluding her for three episodes. A tense confrontation unfolds at the river warehouse.

programme.title: Nova Midday Report
programme.desc: A concise look at the top stories of the morning, presented by anchor Solene Richter.

programme.title: Golden Afternoon Movie: The Long Shore
programme.desc: A 1987 classic starring Raymond Holt as a lighthouse keeper whose quiet life is upended when a stranger washes ashore. Beautifully shot on the Pacific coast.

programme.title: Cook and Conquer
programme.desc: Chef Mario Delacroix challenges two home cooks to recreate his signature bouillabaisse in under 45 minutes with a pantry of mystery ingredients.

programme.title: Evening Edition
programme.desc: Nova 1's primetime newscast. Anchor Solene Richter leads in-depth coverage of the day's top domestic and international stories.

programme.title: The Whitmore Case Encore
programme.desc: Catch up on Season 3, Ep 6 before tonight's new episode. Detective Parrott discovers a second set of fingerprints at the dockside apartment.

programme.title: Late Night with Jojo Kamau
programme.desc: Comedian and host Jojo Kamau sits down with actress Priya Sandhu and musician Travis Lorne. Musical guest: The Elevators.

programme.title: Overnight Cinema: Cold Harbor
programme.desc: A gripping Cold War thriller from 1991. Two rival spies discover they are hunting the same target: each other's handler.

programme.title: Nova 1 Overnight Block
programme.desc: Classic episodes from Nova 1's archive library, running through the early morning hours.

programme.title: Pulse AM
programme.desc: Start your morning with Pulse TV's energetic breakfast show. News, lifestyle tips, and viewer call-ins with hosts Bea Nakamura and Chris Farwell.

programme.title: Renovation Rescue
programme.desc: Ep 12 — The Santos family's kitchen remodel hits a major snag when the contractor discovers original 1940s plumbing behind the walls.

programme.title: Renovation Rescue Repeat
programme.desc: Ep 11 — Contractor Maya Osei races against a wedding deadline to finish a couple's dream master suite. Will the custom closet arrive on time?

programme.title: Dating in the Dark
programme.desc: Six singles navigate the tricky world of modern romance using only voice and personality — no looks allowed. Hosted by Portia James.

programme.title: Pulse Afternoon News
programme.desc: Rolling coverage of today's headlines, weather, and traffic. Presented live from the Pulse TV studio in downtown.

programme.title: The Great Bake-Off Challenge
programme.desc: Twelve amateur bakers tackle this week's theme: tropical flavors. Who will impress judges Helena Marsh and Pierre Fontaine?

programme.title: Pulse Evening News
programme.desc: Your comprehensive evening update. Anchor Derek Yuen covers politics, business, and the stories that matter most.

programme.title: Mansion Hunters
programme.desc: Newlyweds Claudia and Terrence search for their forever home in the hills of Cascadia. Budget: 1.2 million dollars. Expectations: sky-high.

programme.title: Late Pulse
programme.desc: The day's best clips and viral moments curated by the Pulse team, with commentary from rotating guest panelists.

programme.title: Pulse Overnight
programme.desc: Relaxing nature footage and ambient music to carry you through the night.

programme.title: Pulse AM
programme.desc: Start your morning with Pulse TV's energetic breakfast show. News, lifestyle tips, and viewer call-ins with hosts Bea Nakamura and Chris Farwell.

programme.desc: Ep 12 — The Santos family's kitchen remodel hits a major snag when the contractor discovers original 1940s plumbing behind the walls.

programme.desc: Your comprehensive evening update. Anchor Derek Yuen covers politics, business, and the stories that matter most.

programme.desc: The day's best clips and viral moments curated by the Pulse team, with commentary from rotating guest panelists.

programme.title: Pulse Overnight
programme.desc: Relaxing nature footage and ambient music to carry you through the night.

programme.title: Metro Morning Briefing
programme.desc: The overnight stories that shaped the world. Anchor Gwen Holley breaks down the key headlines with correspondents across the region.

programme.title: Business First
programme.desc: Markets open, commodities update, and expert analysis from the Metro Finance Desk.

programme.title: Weather and Traffic
programme.desc: Meteorologist Ray Patel delivers a detailed 5-day forecast, followed by live traffic cameras for the metro area.

programme.title: Metro Live
programme.desc: Continuous rolling news coverage with breaking updates and live press conference feeds.

programme.title: Tech Today
programme.desc: The latest in consumer technology, cybersecurity, and the biggest stories from Silicon Valley.

programme.title: Health Matters
programme.desc: Dr. Simone Okafor answers viewer questions and covers the latest medical research and public health developments.

programme.title: Midday Report
programme.desc: A comprehensive look at the stories developing through the morning, with live interviews from newsmakers.

programme.title: Afternoon Update
programme.desc: Continuing coverage as stories develop. International correspondents file reports from the field.

programme.title: Metro Evening News
programme.desc: The flagship primetime newscast. Anchors Gwen Holley and Marcus Webb lead 60 minutes of comprehensive reporting.

programme.title: The Metro Roundtable
programme.desc: Political analysts and journalists debate the week's top stories. Tonight: infrastructure spending and its impact on local economies.

programme.title: Sports Central
programme.desc: Scores, highlights, and post-game analysis from across the major leagues.

programme.title: Late Night Headlines
programme.desc: A final look at the day's top stories before midnight.

programme.title: World Report
programme.desc: In-depth international coverage from Metro's global correspondents. Tonight's focus: trade tensions and diplomatic negotiations.

programme.title: Metro Overnight
programme.desc: Continuous news ticker with archive documentary programming through the night.

programme.title: Morning Kickoff
programme.desc: Start the day with highlights from last night's games plus a preview of today's schedule. Hosted by Darius Cole and Paula Strand.

programme.title: Replay: Lakeside Classic Tennis Open Men's Final
programme.desc: Full uninterrupted replay of the Lakeside Classic final between Marco Delgado and qualifier Yannick Borel.

programme.title: Horizon Hotlist
programme.desc: The biggest plays, upsets, and moments from the past 7 days ranked by our panel of analysts.

programme.title: LIVE: Northgate United vs Riverport FC
programme.desc: Kickoff at 3:00pm. Two playoff-bound sides meet in a crucial mid-season clash at Northgate Stadium. Commentary by Sean O'Brien and Tanya Reeves.

programme.title: Post-Match Analysis
programme.desc: Immediate reaction and tactical breakdown from tonight's Northgate United match. Player ratings and manager press conference.

programme.title: LIVE: Coastal Sharks vs Inland Raptors Basketball
programme.desc: Conference clash between two top-four sides. Tip-off at 6:30pm local time. Commentary by Marcus Hill.

programme.title: Motorsport Weekly
programme.desc: This week's highlights from the Grand Prix circuit, rallycross championship, and endurance racing series.

programme.title: The Horizon Desk
programme.desc: Evening sports news, scores, and extended post-game interviews.

programme.title: Replay: Championship Cycling Stage 14
programme.desc: Full replay of the dramatic mountain stage that reshuffled the general classification. Three breakaway riders and a summit finish.

programme.title: Overnight Classics
programme.desc: Archive classics from Horizon's vault: iconic matches, championship moments, and legendary athletes.

programme.title: Rise and Bloom
programme.desc: Morning yoga flow, mindfulness practice, and healthy breakfast ideas with wellness coach Amara Singh. Set your intention for the day.

programme.title: Bloom Beauty
programme.desc: Skincare routines, makeup tutorials, and product deep-dives. This week: the best SPF moisturizers for every skin tone.

programme.title: Home and Haven
programme.desc: Interior designer Petra Lowe transforms a cramped studio apartment into a stylish and functional living space on a tight budget.

programme.title: Table for Two
programme.desc: Couples cook a three-course meal together with no prior cooking experience. Host Chef Nneka Osei guides them through each step.

programme.title: Travel Diaries
programme.desc: Bloom's travel correspondent visits the coastal villages of southern Portugal, exploring hidden gems and local cuisine.

programme.title: Mind Full
programme.desc: Psychologist Dr. Ava Torres hosts an honest conversation about stress, screen addiction, and rebuilding work-life balance in the modern age.

programme.title: Bloom Afternoon
programme.desc: A relaxed mix of fashion, home tips, and viewer mail. Hosted by Isla Fairweather.

programme.title: Garden and Grove
programme.desc: Horticulturalist Ben Nakamura demonstrates companion planting techniques for a thriving summer vegetable garden.

programme.title: Bloom Evening
programme.desc: Rounding out the day with self-care rituals, evening routines, and reader inspiration stories.

programme.title: Late Night Unwind
programme.desc: Gentle guided meditation, low-light ambience, and sleep soundscapes to ease your transition into rest.

programme.title: Bloom Overnight
programme.desc: Continuous relaxation programming: nature sounds, slow travel footage, and ambient music.

programme.title: Bloom Overnight
programme.desc: Continuous relaxation programming: nature sounds, slow travel footage, and ambient music.

programme.title: Axiom Dawn
programme.desc: Morning science briefing covering the latest published research from journals worldwide. Hosted by Dr. Petra Engel.

programme.title: Deep Ocean
programme.desc: Ep 4 — Researchers aboard the survey vessel Meridian deploy a new submersible to map an uncharted hydrothermal vent field in the Pacific.

programme.title: The Quantum Question
programme.desc: Theoretical physicist Lena Mori explains quantum entanglement in plain language, and what recent experiments tell us about the nature of reality.

programme.title: Space: The Next 100 Years
programme.desc: An ambitious look at where humanity could be in space a century from now, based on current trajectory and emerging propulsion technologies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Science of Crime
programme.desc: How modern forensic techniques — from DNA phenotyping to digital forensics — are revolutionizing criminal investigations.

programme.title: Climate Lab
programme.desc: Scientists at the Andean Climate Research Institute share 30 years of glacier data and what it means for global freshwater supplies.

programme.title: Engineering Marvels: The Bridge Builders
programme.desc: The story of the team designing a 4km suspension bridge in a seismically active corridor and the engineering innovations that make it possible.

programme.title: Axiom Prime Time
programme.desc: The biggest science stories of the week, analysed by Axiom's panel of researchers and science journalists.

programme.title: The Brain: Mysteries of Consciousness
programme.desc: Neuroscientists explore the boundaries between waking, sleeping, and the as-yet-unexplained phenomenon of near-death experience.

programme.title: Axiom Late Night
programme.desc: Archive documentary marathon. Tonight: classic episodes from the acclaimed series Earth from Above.

programme.title: Axiom Overnight
programme.desc: Continuous archive documentary programming through the early hours.

programme.title: Axiom Dawn
programme.desc: Morning science briefing covering the latest published research from journals worldwide. Hosted by Dr. Petra Engel.

programme.desc: Archive documentary marathon. Tonight: classic episodes from the acclaimed series Earth from Above.

programme.title: Axiom Overnight
programme.desc: Continuous archive documentary programming through the early hours.

programme.title: Morning Movie: Harbor Lights
programme.desc: A 1974 romantic drama about two lighthouse attendants who fall in love during a brutal Atlantic winter. Stars Paul Renner and Celeste Vidal.

programme.title: CineMax Classic: The Iron Meridian
programme.desc: A sweeping 1968 epic set during a fictional South American revolution. Winner of three international film awards.

programme.title: CineMax Preview
programme.desc: Trailers and behind-the-scenes clips from upcoming CineMax 7 premieres.

programme.title: Afternoon Feature: Double Exposure
programme.desc: A psychological thriller from 2004. A photojournalist develops photos that seem to depict crimes that have not happened yet.

programme.title: CineMax Short: The Last Signal
programme.desc: An award-winning 9-minute animated short about a lighthouse keeper and a message in a bottle.

programme.title: CineMax Premiere: Stillwater Falls
programme.desc: A small-town mystery unfolds when a retired detective moves to a quiet lakeside town and finds it hiding dark secrets. A CineMax 7 original film.

programme.title: Evening Feature: The Carver Affair
programme.desc: A 1998 legal thriller. A public defender takes on an impossible case and uncovers a conspiracy reaching the highest levels of city government.

programme.title: Late Night Feature: Sandstorm Protocol
programme.desc: An action-packed 2002 geopolitical thriller set across three continents. An intelligence analyst races to stop a rogue weapons deal.

programme.title: CineMax Midnight Classic: Glass Houses
programme.desc: A stylish 1979 noir film featuring an unforgettable performance from actress Miriam Voss as a wealthy socialite with a dangerous secret.

programme.title: CineMax Overnight: Archive Cinema
programme.desc: Back-to-back public-domain classic films from the 1940s and 1950s.

programme.title: Morning Movie: Harbor Lights
programme.desc: A 1974 romantic drama about two lighthouse attendants who fall in love during a brutal Atlantic winter. Stars Paul Renner and Celeste Vidal.

programme.title: CineMax Classic: The Iron Meridian
programme.desc: A sweeping 1968 epic set during a fictional South American revolution. Winner of three international film awards.

programme.desc: Trailers and behind-the-scenes clips from upcoming CineMax 7 premieres.

programme.desc: An award-winning 9-minute animated short about a lighthouse keeper and a message in a bottle.

programme.desc: A small-town mystery unfolds when a retired detective moves to a quiet lakeside town and finds it hiding dark secrets. A CineMax 7 original film.

programme.desc: A 1998 legal thriller. A public defender takes on an impossible case and uncovers a conspiracy reaching the highest levels of city government.

programme.desc: An action-packed 2002 geopolitical thriller set across three continents. An intelligence analyst races to stop a rogue weapons deal.

programme.desc: A stylish 1979 noir film featuring an unforgettable performance from actress Miriam Voss as a wealthy socialite with a dangerous secret.

programme.title: CineMax Overnight: Archive Cinema
programme.desc: Back-to-back public-domain classic films from the 1940s and 1950s.

programme.title: Good Morning KidZone!
programme.desc: Wake up with KidZone's cheerful morning host Sunny the Sunflower! Songs, dances, and a weather report just for kids.

programme.title: Captain Cosmos Jr.
programme.desc: Ep 22 — Captain Cosmos and his crew land on the planet Zorbula, where all the colors have gone missing. Can they find the Rainbow Crystal in time?

programme.title: The Woodland Bunch
programme.desc: Hedgehog Harriet and her friends discover a mysterious map in the old oak tree. An adventure through Fernwood begins!

programme.title: Dino Day
programme.desc: Learn about dinosaurs with 8-year-old palaeontology fanatic Theo, who visits a museum excavation and helps identify a new fossil find.

programme.title: Splish Splash Science
programme.desc: Professor Puddle teaches kids about surface tension, density, and buoyancy using nothing but water, food coloring, and kitchen supplies.

programme.title: Storyteller's Corner
programme.desc: Award-winning author Mia Benson reads from her popular picture book series The Letters of Luma Lane, followed by a craft activity.

programme.title: Captain Cosmos Jr. Repeat
programme.desc: Ep 21 — The crew must outsmart the sneaky Space Pirates to recover a stolen star map. Teamwork and quick thinking save the day.

programme.title: KidZone Fun Break
programme.desc: Mini-games, viewer art showcase, jokes from the KidZone mailbag, and a singalong session!

programme.title: Animal Planet Jr.
programme.desc: A junior version of the classic nature documentary, narrated by a child and illustrated with stunning wildlife footage.

programme.title: Math Rockets
programme.desc: Blast off into maths! Today's mission: multiplication tables, fractions, and a special puzzle challenge for ages 8-12.

programme.title: The Big Art Show
programme.desc: Young artists aged 6-11 showcase their creations, with tips from professional illustrator Rosa Ferreira.

programme.title: Bedtime with KidZone
programme.desc: Wind down with a gentle story, stargazing facts, and lullabies. Sweet dreams from all of us at KidZone!

programme.title: The Woodland Bunch Repeat
programme.desc: Ep rerun for evening viewers. Harriet and friends navigate Fernwood and discover the map leads to a very special surprise.

programme.title: Family Movie: The Lighthouse Keeper's Son
programme.desc: A heartwarming family adventure about a 10-year-old boy who discovers his lighthouse has magical powers. Rated G.

programme.title: KidZone Late: Galaxy Scouts
programme.desc: Science fiction anthology series suitable for ages 10 and up. Two episodes back to back. Space exploration and problem-solving adventures.

programme.title: KidZone Overnight
programme.desc: Quiet ambient programming with soft music and calming visuals for the early morning hours.

programme.desc: Wake up with KidZone's cheerful morning host Sunny the Sunflower! Songs, dances, and a weather report just for kids.

programme.title: KidZone Overnight
programme.desc: Quiet ambient programming with soft music and calming visuals for the early morning hours.

programme.title: Groove AM
programme.desc: Ease into the morning with a curated mix of indie pop, lo-fi beats, and acoustic sessions to start your day right.

programme.title: New Music Monday
programme.desc: The freshest releases of the week across pop, R&B, hip-hop, and alternative — videos and reviews from the Groove team.

programme.title: Artist Spotlight: The Ember Coast
programme.desc: An hour dedicated to indie folk duo The Ember Coast — full videos, behind-the-scenes footage, and an exclusive studio session.

programme.title: Groove Classics: 90s Hits
programme.desc: Nonstop videos from the decade that defined music video culture. From grunge to boy bands, it's all here.

programme.title: Groove Chart Show
programme.desc: This week's top 20 countdown, as voted by Groove Music TV viewers. Who will take the number one spot?

programme.title: Lunch Break Beats
programme.desc: A DJ-style mix set curated for your midday vibe. Today's curator: DJ Sable from the Coastal Cities scene.

programme.title: Groove Sessions: Live Acoustic
programme.desc: Singer-songwriter Elena Vance performs an intimate 30-minute acoustic set recorded at the Groove TV studios.

programme.title: Decade Rewind: The 00s
programme.desc: A nostalgic journey through the noughties — emo anthems, pop punk, rap-rock crossovers, and bubblegum pop.

programme.title: Groove Evening Mix
programme.desc: The perfect soundtrack for your evening. Curated R&B, neo-soul, and chilled electronic to wind down with.

programme.title: Concert Replay: The Meridian Festival
programme.desc: Highlights from last summer's Meridian Music Festival, featuring performances from six artists across three stages.

programme.title: Late Night Groove
programme.desc: The coolest sounds for night owls — ambient, jazz fusion, trip-hop, and late-night electronic from around the world.

programme.title: Groove Overnight: Chill Mix Vol. 8
programme.desc: Continuous low-tempo music to carry you through the night. Perfect for sleep, study, or late-night drives.

programme.title: Groove Early Morning Extended
programme.desc: Uplifting acoustic and indie folk to greet the sunrise. Ambient and instrumental programming running through to morning.

programme.title: Groove AM
programme.desc: Ease into the morning with a curated mix of indie pop, lo-fi beats, and acoustic sessions to start your day right.

programme.title: New Music Monday
programme.desc: The freshest releases of the week across pop, R&B, hip-hop, and alternative — videos and reviews from the Groove team.

programme.title: Artist Spotlight: The Ember Coast
programme.desc: An hour dedicated to indie folk duo The Ember Coast — full videos, behind-the-scenes footage, and an exclusive studio session.

programme.title: Groove Classics: 90s Hits
programme.desc: Nonstop videos from the decade that defined music video culture. From grunge to boy bands, it's all here.

programme.title: Groove Chart Show
programme.desc: This week's top 20 countdown, as voted by Groove Music TV viewers. Who will take the number one spot?

programme.title: Lunch Break Beats
programme.desc: A DJ-style mix set curated for your midday vibe. Today's curator: DJ Sable from the Coastal Cities scene.

programme.title: Groove Sessions: Live Acoustic
programme.desc: Singer-songwriter Elena Vance performs an intimate 30-minute acoustic set recorded at the Groove TV studios.

programme.title: Decade Rewind: The 00s
programme.desc: A nostalgic journey through the noughties — emo anthems, pop punk, rap-rock crossovers, and bubblegum pop.

programme.desc: The perfect soundtrack for your evening. Curated R&B, neo-soul, and chilled electronic to wind down with.

programme.desc: Highlights from last summer's Meridian Music Festival, featuring performances from six artists across three stages.
